mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE UPPER(email) = UPPER(#{email})
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'usr-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || ( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('usr-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1 ) FROM users WHERE user_code LIKE 'usr-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%' AND REGEXP_LIKE( SUBSTR( user_code, LENGTH('usr-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-') + 1 ), '^[0-9]+$' )
INSERT INTO users ( user_code, company_id, login_id, password, user_name, email, phone_number, status, owner_yn, admin_yn ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{companyId}, #{loginId}, #{encodedPassword}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, 'a1', 0, 0 )
